name: auctions-ingestion
description: AuctionsAPI -> Neon Postgres ingestion system (AWS Lambda + Step Functions + EventBridge, Pulumi) + Next.js frontend.

scripts.deploy: pnpm run build:functions && pnpm --filter @auctions-ingestion/infra run up
scripts.preview: pnpm run build:functions && pnpm --filter @auctions-ingestion/infra run preview
scripts.check: pnpm run type-check && pnpm run lint
